title: Unify billing on preapproval + MercadoPago-native trial (card-first)

tasks.title: Add PENDING_PROVIDER -> TRIALING edge to VALID_TRANSITIONS
tasks.description: Add the single missing state-machine edge in packages/service-core/src/services/billing/subscription/subscription-status-transitions.ts:72-77 (today PENDING_PROVIDER allows only { ACTIVE, ABANDONED }). Without it the first webhook after authorization is rejected and activation is silently skipped (HOS-108 failure mode). Tests: unit test asserting checkSubscriptionStatusTransition(PENDING_PROVIDER, TRIALING) is valid (AC-4), in packages/service-core/test/services/billing/subscription/subscription-status-transitions.test.ts.

subtasks.title: Add TRIALING to the PENDING_PROVIDER transition set

tasks.title: Create deriveTrialingStatus pure helper with full truth table
tasks.description: New pure, I/O-free helper in @repo/service-core beside the other subscription-status helpers. Signature per spec 7.1: deriveTrialingStatus({ mappedStatus, trialEnd, now }) => SubscriptionStatusEnum. Truth table: ACTIVE + future trialEnd => TRIALING; ACTIVE + null trialEnd => ACTIVE; ACTIVE + past trialEnd => ACTIVE; any other mappedStatus => unchanged (never derive off paused/cancelled/past_due/finished). Clock injected for testability. Tests: unit, the FULL truth table (future/null/past trialEnd x every mappedStatus) - AC-1/AC-3.

subtasks.title: Write the truth-table unit test first

tasks.title: Wire deriveTrialingStatus into processSubscriptionUpdated
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/subscription-logic.ts. QZPAY_TO_HOSPEDA_STATUS (:98-105) MUST stay a static Record - do not make it row-aware. The derivation lands AFTER Step 5's local-row lookup (:401-410) and BEFORE Step 6's comparison (:514), so that both the Step 6b fast-path guard (:567) and the in-transaction guard (:717) see the same derived value. trialEnd comes from the already-fetched localSubscription => zero extra queries. Tests: extend apps/api/test/webhooks/subscription-logic.test.ts - arrange qzpay .get() returning status 'active' + future trialEnd, assert local row becomes trialing (AC-1).

subtasks.title: Insert derivation between Step 5 and Step 6
Verify both guards observe the derived value

tasks.title: Fix getTrialStatus.isExpired lockout (status-aware)
tasks.description: CRITICAL (spec 7.1.a, R-2). apps/api/src/services/trial.service.ts:447 computes isExpired from trialEnd ALONE with no status check. Harmless today (conversion creates a NEW row with null trialEnd) but under card-first the SAME row carries trialEnd and becomes ACTIVE => isExpired true => middlewares/trial.ts:137 throws HTTP 402 TRIAL_EXPIRED on every write for a fully paid-up customer. Fix: const isExpired = isOnTrial && trialEnd ? now > trialEnd : false. The historical-subscription branch (:392-436) keys off status 'canceled' and is unaffected; middlewares/trial.ts needs no edit. Tests: AC-5 regression guard - active + past trialEnd => isExpired === false. Write the test FIRST (it must fail).

tasks.title: Write AC-6/AC-7 regression guards for the trial reconciler (RED)
tasks.description: THE MOST IMPORTANT NEW TESTS IN THE SPEC. Without them a reconciler that still cancels passes every other test in the suite. Write BEFORE touching the cron. AC-6: local trialing sub, trialEnd passed, MP preapproval authorized => transitions trialing -> active, is NEVER cancelled, no TRIAL_EXPIRED sent. AC-7: same but day-N charge failed => transitions to past_due and the existing dunning cron owns it. These must FAIL against today's blockExpiredTrials (which cancels).

subtasks.title: AC-6 test: authorized => active, never cancelled
Confirm both FAIL against current code

tasks.title: Invert blockExpiredTrials into a trial reconciler
tasks.description: CRITICAL (spec 7.1.b, R-1). Today trial.service.ts:537-825 (289 LOC) lists trialing subs, filters trialEnd < now, CANCELS at :718, stamps trialConvertedAt, inserts TRIAL_BLOCKED, sends TRIAL_EXPIRED. Under card-first all five actions are wrong: it would cancel every converting customer at the exact moment they start paying. Same skeleton, inverted outcome: KEEP the advisory lock (BLOCK_EXPIRED_TRIALS_LOCK_KEY = 1004, :69), the batch bound (:82), the claim/process split (ADR-019) and the per-subscription dedup-event guard (:642-662). New body: find local trialing subs with trialEnd < now => re-retrieve() the preapproval from MP => authorized/active => TRIALING -> ACTIVE (edge exists :81); cancelled/paused => mirror (edges :79-86); charge failed => PAST_DUE. Load-bearing, not optional: MP fires subscription_authorized_payment.created on the day-N charge but the preapproval status does NOT change (authorized -> authorized), so a preapproval.updated webhook may never arrive; without this the sub stays TRIALING forever and RENEWAL_REMINDER never fires (it filters status active). subscription-poll.job.ts does NOT cover this (it only runs enqueued polling jobs).

subtasks.title: Replace the cancel body with retrieve + reconcile
Preserve lock, batch bound, claim/process split, dedup guard
Route failed charge to PAST_DUE for the dunning cron

tasks.title: Rename the cron job to reflect the inverted semantics
tasks.description: Rename block-expired-trials to the reconciler name across the job file, cron registration, logs and any settings key. A cron named 'block' that converts is a landmine for the next reader. Keep the advisory lock key value (1004) unchanged - renaming it would let an old and new instance run concurrently during deploy.

tasks.title: Move the one-trial-per-customer-for-life guard to the checkout call site
tasks.description: Spec 10 'Preserved'. Today the AUTHORITATIVE gate is startTrial's any-subscription check (trial.service.ts:259-271), with the checkout's :539-540 (and the annual mirror :1207-1208) as a 'cheap first-layer short-circuit'. When startTrial dies that relationship INVERTS: the checkout check becomes the single authoritative gate and must be race-safe ON ITS OWN (it no longer has a second checker behind it). Tests: AC-10 - a customer with ANY prior subscription (any status, any product domain, including cancelled) gets NO trial and goes to the normal paid preapproval.

subtasks.title: Port the any-subscription check to the checkout call site
AC-10 test incl. cancelled + cross-domain prior subs

tasks.title: Reroute the trial checkout to createPaidSubscription({ freeTrialDays })
tasks.description: Spec 7.4 - closes the 74-day leak (G-4). The summing code ALREADY EXISTS and is ALREADY CORRECT (trial.service.ts:247-248: baseTrialDays = env.HOSPEDA_TRIAL_DAYS_OVERRIDE ?? planTrialDays; trialDays = baseTrialDays + (extraTrialDays ?? 0)). It only needs REROUTING: today it feeds billing.subscriptions.create({ trialDays }) (:288-307, no-card); tomorrow it feeds createPaidSubscription({ freeTrialDays }) (paid-subscription-create.ts:54, 128-131), which qzpay maps to auto_recurring.free_trial (subscription.adapter.ts:179,196,248-253) as { frequency: N, frequency_type: 'days' } - days regardless of billing cadence; the spike's 74-day trial proves no cap. PRESERVE the HOSPEDA_TRIAL_DAYS_OVERRIDE=0 kill-switch: the base-length guard is evaluated BEFORE the extension is added (:250-256), so an extension promo can never resurrect a disabled trial. Per-effect_kind precedence is unchanged (comp wins > trial_extension lengthens > discount yields with promoCodeIgnored). Tests: AC-8 (exactly ONE free_trial of 74 days reaches the MP body, not 14+74) and AC-9 (override=0 => no trial, charged immediately).

subtasks.title: Point the base+promo sum at createPaidSubscription
AC-8 integration test on the MP create body

tasks.title: Delete TrialService.startTrial() and POST /billing/trial/start
tasks.description: DONE. startTrial + POST /trial/start deleted (-1102 LOC with the publish change). The last caller was the accommodation-publish flow, which the owner decided (2026-07-15) must now send an owner with no live subscription to the plans page to enter a card — first_publish rejects with subscription_required, a path the web already had. GET /trial/status kept: the read layer survives.

tasks.title: Remove the 'trial' variant from CheckoutAppliedEffect
tasks.description: subscription-checkout.service.ts:382 - delete the 'trial' variant from the union; 'comp'/'discount' stay. NOTE the verified correction (spec 10): in PlanPurchaseButton.client.tsx:727-736 trial is FUSED with comp in one OR condition (=== 'trial' || === 'comp'), so removing trial deletes ~0 net lines - comp needs the identical block. Do NOT split the block 'for clarity'; that ADDS lines. Tests: apps/api/test/services/subscription-checkout-promo-branches.test.ts (977 LOC) asserts the appliedEffect==='trial' branch and needs a real rewrite.

subtasks.title: Collapse the fused OR in PlanPurchaseButton, keeping comp

tasks.title: Reroute initiatePaidAnnualSubscription to the shared preapproval path
tasks.description: Spec 7.2 (G-1, AC-11). initiatePaidAnnualSubscription (subscription-checkout.service.ts:1120) stops calling createAnnualSubscription (:1367); instead it resolves the annual price via findAnnualPrice (:256-261) and calls the SAME shared createPaidSubscription the monthly path uses (:632). ZERO qzpay changes: toMercadoPagoInterval (subscription.adapter.ts:231-246) already maps year => { intervalFrequency: count*12, intervalType: 'months' } - the mapping existed and nobody used it because annual diverted to Checkout Pro before reaching it. Prefer 12 months over 365 days (leap years + calendar alignment). frequency_type 'years' is rejected by MP (400). Tests: AC-11 integration - the create body carries frequency 12 / frequency_type 'months' and NO Checkout Pro one-time charge is created.

subtasks.title: AC-11 integration test on the create body

tasks.title: Delete create-annual-subscription.ts and its two importers
tasks.description: Whole file: apps/api/src/services/billing/create-annual-subscription.ts (406 LOC, verified). Two importers: subscription-checkout.service.ts:43 and trial.service.ts:43. This is why HOS-123 (annual reactivation) dies - there is nothing to reactivate when it renews itself.

tasks.title: Delete the annual payment.updated confirmation path
tasks.description: Spec 7.2. The annual confirmation path in payment-logic.ts and its metadata.annualSubscriptionId matcher die with create-annual-subscription.ts - annual now confirms through the SAME subscription_preapproval.updated path as monthly. This is a simplification. Verify no other caller depends on the annualSubscriptionId metadata key before deleting.

tasks.title: Maintain currentPeriodEnd from MP next_payment_date
tasks.description: SUPERSEDED by the webhook flip. The point of anchoring currentPeriodEnd was to make RENEWAL_REMINDER fire and to know when the day-N charge landed. The subscription_authorized_payment webhook now tells us the moment it settles and flips trialing -> active there, so the status filter RENEWAL_REMINDER already uses (status: active) starts working with no anchor work. Re-open only if annual renewal reminders prove to need currentPeriodEnd specifically.

subtasks.title: Persist currentPeriodEnd for annual + monthly preapprovals
AC-12 test: RENEWAL_REMINDER fires once at 7 days with correct date+amount
AC-13 test: a trialing sub gets NO renewal reminder

tasks.title: Defensive amount-reconciliation check on subscription payments
tasks.description: Spec 7.5 item 3 (G-6, AC-14). Ships REGARDLESS of whether MP's panel discount campaigns turn out to apply (OQ-4) - it covers us against this, against a future campaign, and against anything else MP does to the amount without telling us. In the webhook that processes subscription charges: compare incoming payment.transaction_amount against the expected amount from billing_subscriptions/billing_plans, detect non-null coupon_amount/campaign_id (the detection fields already exist and nobody reads them), and log + alert to Sentry on mismatch with expected vs actual and the campaign_id. EXPLICITLY NOT FAIL-CLOSED: a mismatch must ALERT, NEVER reject the payment - rejecting money because our expectation is stale is a worse failure than a logged discrepancy. (Contrast the signup-discount path at subscription-checkout.service.ts:696-704 which IS fail-closed, because there WE mutate the amount.) Tests: AC-14 - payment accepted, discrepancy logged + reported.

subtasks.title: Resolve the expected amount for the subscription

tasks.title: Seed data-migration 0015 for plan trial configuration
tasks.description: NOT NEEDED — verified. §8/AC-15 is conditional: a seed data-migration is required only when a plan metadata.hasTrial/.trialDays VALUE changes. HOS-171 changes the trial MECHANISM (no-card -> MP free_trial), not the commercial values: plans.config.ts is untouched by this branch (git diff origin/staging...HEAD -- packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts is empty), owner-basico still declares hasTrial:true trialDays:14. The Model C DB-wins trap therefore does not bite. If the §13 rollout later retunes a plan trial length, THAT change needs its own 0015 migration.

tasks.title: ADR-009 addendum + spec/docs reconciliation
tasks.description: Spec NG-2: ADR-009 (trial is HOST-only) needs NO revision - the HOST-only rule is justified by growth economics, unrelated to WHEN the card is collected. A one-line addendum suffices. Also update packages/billing/CLAUDE.md and the root CLAUDE.md billing quick-reference where they describe the no-card trial or the annual one-time charge.
